trivia_bullets.text: Common from Murders at Karlov Manor (MKM), released February 9, 2024. The set returns to Ravnica through a murder-mystery lens: the Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations (R.A.M.I.), founded after the New Phyrexian invasion, investigates a conspiracy involving most of the plane's major characters. The card's name is literal — a coroner working for R.A.M.I.
sources: Wizards.com: A First Look at Murders at Karlov Manor

trivia_bullets.text: The Scryfall type line reads Creature — Ogre Cleric (3/6), not goblin. The art's pointed ears and stout build read goblin to the eye, but the printed type confirms Ogre. The Cleric subtype frames the card's function: a ritualistic examiner drawing knowledge from sacrificed creatures.

"Well, cause of death seems pretty straightforward, but what else can you tell me, friend?" — no named speaker attributed. The line is addressed to the corpse on the table, consistent with forensic-magic practice on Ravnica.

In MKM limited, Draftsim's review called it 'functional and can be fine if you want something at the top of your curve' but generally weak for a 5-drop. EDHREC rank 25,421 — minimal Commander adoption.
sources: Draftsim: MKM Limited Set Review via WebSearch snippet
